author: tamiroh
description: Run focus and break cycles using methods like the Pomodoro Technique, and record completed intervals on your Markdown task lines. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

## 🚀 Features

- Show timer commands only when available @tamiroh (#275)
- Validate stored plugin settings on load @tamiroh (#273)
- Apply timer setting changes to future intervals @tamiroh (#271)
- Blink timer separator while running @tamiroh (#268)
- Dismiss system notifications when Obsidian window gains focus @tamiroh (#261)
- Validate persisted timer snapshots @tamiroh (#255)

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fix Retime accepting non-integer minutes @tamiroh (#276)
- Ignore task lines inside Markdown code blocks @tamiroh (#274)

## 🤖 Dependency Updates

- Bump release-drafter/release-drafter from 6 to 7 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#252)
- Bump codecov/codecov-action from 6.0.1 to 7.0.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#264)
- Bump toshimaru/auto-author-assign from 3.0.2 to 3.0.3 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#265)
- Bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#266)
- Bump js-yaml from 4.1.1 to 4.3.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#262)
- Bump fast-uri from 3.1.0 to 3.1.2 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#257)
- Bump postcss from 8.5.9 to 8.5.13 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#256)
- Bump codecov/codecov-action from 5.5.2 to 6.0.1 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#258)
- Bump picomatch @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#246)
- Bump typescript-eslint from 8.56.1 to 8.58.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#250)
- Bump toshimaru/auto-author-assign from 3.0.1 to 3.0.2 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#254)
- Bump vite, @vitest/coverage-v8 and vitest @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#253)

## 🧰 Maintenance

- Prepare for community plugin submission @tamiroh (#280)
- Add MIT License to the project @tamiroh (#281)
- Move static inline styles to CSS classes @tamiroh (#279)
- Add more tests @tamiroh (#278)
- Extract Obsidian global test fakes into src @tamiroh (#277)
- Update deps @tamiroh (#270)
- Introduce Stylelint @tamiroh (#269)
- Update deps @tamiroh (#267)

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/compare/0.3.2...0.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

## 🚀 Features

- Auto-increment task line intervals @tamiroh (#224)
- Don't notify when triggered manually @tamiroh (#219)
- Allow retiming the timer @tamiroh (#218)
- Disable auto reset notification @tamiroh (#216)
- Don’t flash on manual triggers @tamiroh (#210)
- Enable clearing interval set with right-click on StatusBar @tamiroh (#208)
- Add flash overlay on timer end @tamiroh (#207)
- Add auto-reset at configurable time @tamiroh (#204)
- Improve timer behavior on interaction @tamiroh (#155)
- Use `Setting`'s headings on setting tab @tamiroh (#154)

## 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fix `NaN` error @tamiroh (#196)

## 🤖 Dependency Updates

- Bump minimatch @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#237)

## 🧰 Maintenance

- Validation @tamiroh (#238)

- Rename `main.ts` to `plugin.ts` @tamiroh (#226)

- Use `Date` instead of Moment.js @tamiroh (#221)
- Improve tests @tamiroh (#220)
- Remove `withContext` method (Reverts "Don’t flash on manual triggers") @tamiroh (#217)
- Rename all files to kebab-case 🍖 @tamiroh (#209)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Add trailing commas by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/3
* Support system notification by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/2
* Update notice by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/4
* Fix CI config by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/7
* Enable `forceConsistentCasingInFileNames` by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/8
* Replace Time class with Time type by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/6
* Flatten directory structure by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/9
* Partially inline types related to CountdownTimer by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/10
* Disable `class-methods-use-this` rule by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/11
* Add StatusBar class by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/12
* Rename CountDownTimer prop by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/13
* Add release workflow by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/14
* Release 0.1.0 by @tamiroh in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/15

## New Contributors
* @tamiroh made their first contribution in https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tamiroh/obsidian-interval-timer/commits/0.1.0
